autoTutorial.name: Bear and Big Brother
shortDescription: Bear Limak wants to become the largest of bears, or at least to become larger than his brother Bob
Limak's weight is smaller than or equal to his brother's weight
autoTutorial.solution: Just run a while loop and check if Limak's weight is greater than Bob's weight. If it is, then break the loop and print how many iteration it took to get to the condition.
